test_plan.strategy: Unit tests for all new logic/persistence modules (app-version-reader, admin API handlers, git-reader additions, deprecation commands). Integration tests for file I/O (projects.json CRUD, atomic write). Component tests via React Testing Library + jsdom for all UI changes (card sections, admin panel, URL router). Every FR has a happy-path, edge-case, and negative test. FR-012 is tested as a flat always-visible layout (superseding the collapsible AC from Phase 1 per UX spec approval).

test_cases.title: Home — no tab navigation rendered when projects exist
preconditions: App component rendered with 3 project entries in dashboard data
test_cases.given: App receives dashboard data with 3 healthy projects
test_cases.then: no element with role='tablist' or className containing 'tabs' or 'tab-btn' is present in the DOM; all 3 project cards are visible
steps: render(<App />) with mocked fetch returning 3-project dashboard
test_cases.expected_result: No tab navigation present; all project cards visible on initial render

test_cases.title: Home — empty state shown when 0 projects, no tab required
preconditions: App rendered with empty projects array
test_cases.then: empty state message visible; no tab navigation; link to /admin present
steps: render(<App />) with mocked fetch returning { projects: [] }
test_cases.expected_result: Empty state with /admin link rendered, no tabs

test_cases.title: Home — triage section absent when no blocking alerts
preconditions: All projects have status healthy, no blocking alerts
test_cases.then: no element with class 'triage' is present in the DOM
steps: render home with 3 healthy projects, all alerts: []
test_cases.expected_result: Triage section not rendered when no blocking alerts exist

test_cases.title: Card — pipeline bar shows 3/5 at 60% fill for 3 approved phases
preconditions: ProjectCard rendered with project having approvedPhases: [1,2,3]
test_cases.then: text '3/5' visible; progress bar element has width style of 60%; bar color is yellow (--syn-yellow)
test_cases.expected_result: 3/5 label visible, bar at 60% with yellow color

test_cases.title: Card — blocking badge absent when 0 blocking alerts
test_cases.then: no element with class 'blocking-badge' or text matching /blocking/ in key metrics section
test_cases.expected_result: Blocking badge element not present in DOM

test_cases.title: Card — blocking badge shows count 2 when 2 blocking alerts exist
test_cases.then: blocking badge element present showing '2' in red color
test_cases.expected_result: Red badge with '2' visible in key metrics section

test_cases.title: Card — tests row shows N/A when no testSummary
test_cases.then: tests row shows 'N/A' in dim color
test_cases.expected_result: Tests row displays 'N/A'

test_cases.title: Card — health grade A shown in green for score ≥90
preconditions: Project with 5 approved phases, all tests passing, no blocking alerts
test_cases.then: grade badge shows 'A' with color var(--syn-green)
test_cases.expected_result: Grade 'A' rendered in green

test_cases.title: Card — app version shown below project name when available
test_cases.then: text 'v1.2.3' visible below the project name, in dim color; no interaction required
test_cases.expected_result: Version 'v1.2.3' visible below project name

test_cases.title: Card — app version row absent when appVersion is null
test_cases.then: no version element rendered below project name
test_cases.expected_result: No version row in card header

test_cases.title: Card — GIT unpushed row absent when unpushedCommits is null
test_cases.given: project has no tracking branch (unpushedCommits: null)
test_cases.then: no '↑ commits not pushed' row in GIT section
test_cases.expected_result: Unpushed commits row not rendered

test_cases.title: Card — GIT unpushed row shows count when unpushedCommits > 0
test_cases.then: '↑ 3 commits not pushed' visible in GIT section in yellow color
test_cases.expected_result: Unpushed commits row visible with count 3

test_cases.title: Admin panel — lists 3 projects from API response
preconditions: AdminPanel rendered with mocked GET /api/projects returning 3 entries
test_cases.then: 3 project rows visible; each shows name, type badge, and path/URL
test_cases.expected_result: 3 rows rendered with correct name, type, and location

test_cases.title: Admin panel — empty state shown when 0 projects
test_cases.then: empty state message visible; add form auto-expanded
steps: render(<AdminPanel />) with mocked fetch returning { projects: [] }
test_cases.expected_result: Empty state with auto-expanded add form

test_cases.title: Admin panel — error banner when API fetch fails
test_cases.then: error banner visible mentioning 'aitri-hub web'
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner shown with actionable message

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST adds valid local project to projects.json
test_cases.then: projects.json gains a new entry with generated id, name 'new-proj', response status 201
steps: Call admin API POST handler with valid payload
Assert new entry has name='new-proj', type='local', location='/tmp/new-proj'
Assert new entry has an id of 8 hex chars
test_cases.expected_result: 201 response, projects.json updated with new entry

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST with non-existent local path returns 400
test_cases.then: response status 400, error code 'path_not_found', projects.json unchanged
steps: Call POST handler with non-existent path
test_cases.expected_result: 400 with error 'path_not_found'; no write to disk

test_cases.title: Admin API — POST with duplicate name returns 400
test_cases.then: response 400 with error 'name_duplicate', projects.json unchanged
test_cases.expected_result: 400 name_duplicate; no write

test_cases.title: Admin API — DELETE removes project from projects.json
test_cases.then: response 204, projects.json no longer contains entry with id 'abc12345'
steps: Set up projects.json with entry id='abc12345'
Assert projects.json does not contain id 'abc12345'
test_cases.expected_result: 204, entry removed from projects.json

test_cases.title: Admin panel — remove dialog cancel leaves projects.json unchanged
preconditions: AdminPanel with 2 projects; user clicks Remove on first
test_cases.then: dialog closes; project row still present; DELETE not called
test_cases.expected_result: Dialog dismissed, no deletion, 2 rows remain

test_cases.title: Admin API — DELETE non-existent id returns 404
preconditions: projects.json has no entry with id 'xxxxxxxx'
test_cases.then: response 404 with error 'not_found'
test_cases.expected_result: 404 not_found

test_cases.title: Admin API — GET returns empty array when projects.json does not exist
test_cases.given: GET /api/projects with no projects.json on disk
test_cases.then: response 200 with body { projects: [] }
steps: Assert response.body.projects is an empty array
test_cases.expected_result: 200 { projects: [] } — no crash when file absent

test_cases.title: Admin API — atomic write: projects.json not corrupted on concurrent calls
test_cases.then: projects.json is valid JSON after both complete (no partial write)
steps: Fire two POST requests with different names simultaneously
Assert result.projects.length >= 3 (2 original + at least 1 new)
test_cases.expected_result: projects.json is always valid JSON after write

test_cases.title: Admin API — PUT with unknown id returns 404
preconditions: projects.json has no entry with id 'zzzzzzzz'
test_cases.then: response 404 with error 'not_found'; projects.json unchanged
test_cases.expected_result: 404 not_found

test_cases.title: setup deprecation — prints admin URL and exits 0 without prompts
test_cases.then: stdout contains 'http://localhost:3000/admin'; no readline interface created; process.exitCode is 0
steps: Spy on readline.createInterface to assert not called
Assert console.log was called with string matching /localhost:3000\/admin/
test_cases.expected_result: Deprecation notice printed, no prompts, exit 0

test_cases.title: setup deprecation — projects.json not modified
test_cases.given: projects.json has 2 entries before cmdSetup() is called
test_cases.then: projects.json still has exactly 2 entries after call
test_cases.expected_result: projects.json unchanged after deprecation notice

test_cases.title: monitor deprecation — prints dashboard URL, exits 0, no screen clear
test_cases.then: stdout contains 'http://localhost:3000'; no ESC[2J ANSI sequence written; process exits within 500ms
steps: Assert output does NOT contain '\x1b[2J' (ANSI clear screen)
test_cases.expected_result: Deprecation notice only; no terminal dashboard rendered

test_cases.title: Dark mode — no theme toggle button rendered in header
test_cases.then: no button with aria-label matching /theme|toggle|color/i present
test_cases.expected_result: No theme toggle button in header

test_cases.title: Dark mode — localStorage not read or written on render
test_cases.then: localStorage.getItem('aitri-theme') returns null after render
test_cases.expected_result: No localStorage access for theme on render

test_cases.title: Security — path traversal payload rejected with 400
test_cases.then: response 400 with error 'path_traversal'; no filesystem read or write
test_cases.expected_result: 400 path_traversal; zero filesystem operations

test_cases.title: Security — encoded path traversal rejected
test_cases.then: response 400 with error 'path_traversal'
steps: Call POST handler with URL-encoded traversal path
test_cases.expected_result: 400 for encoded traversal attempts

test_cases.title: Observability — GET /api/projects logs request to stdout
preconditions: Admin API handler with stdout capture
test_cases.then: stdout contains a line matching ISO8601 timestamp + 'GET /api/projects 200'
test_cases.expected_result: Log line with timestamp, method, path, status

test_cases.title: Usability — admin panel renders without horizontal scroll at 768px
test_cases.given: AdminPanel rendered at 768px viewport width with 3 projects
test_cases.then: document.body.scrollWidth <= 768; all 3 project rows visible
test_cases.expected_result: No horizontal overflow at 768px; all rows visible

test_cases.title: app-version-reader — reads version from package.json
test_cases.then: returns '2.0.1'
test_cases.expected_result: '2.0.1' returned

test_cases.title: app-version-reader — falls back to VERSION file when no package.json
test_cases.given: project dir has VERSION file with content '1.0.0-beta\n'
test_cases.then: returns '1.0.0-beta' (trimmed)
test_cases.expected_result: '1.0.0-beta' returned from VERSION file

test_cases.title: app-version-reader — returns null when neither file exists
preconditions: No package.json and no VERSION file in project dir
test_cases.given: project dir has no package.json and no VERSION file
test_cases.then: returns null without throwing
test_cases.expected_result: null returned, no crash

test_cases.title: git-reader — unpushedCommits returns count when tracking branch exists
preconditions: git repo with tracking branch; 2 local commits not pushed
test_cases.then: returned object has unpushedCommits: 2
test_cases.expected_result: unpushedCommits: 2

test_cases.title: git-reader — unpushedCommits returns null when no tracking branch
preconditions: git repo with no upstream tracking branch
test_cases.then: returned object has unpushedCommits: null (not 0)
test_cases.expected_result: unpushedCommits: null — distinct from 0

test_cases.title: Home — fetch failure renders error state, no tabs or crash
test_cases.then: error message visible; no tab navigation; no uncaught exception
steps: Mock fetch to reject with new Error('network')
test_cases.expected_result: Error state shown gracefully, no crash

test_cases.title: Admin panel — shows error message when GET /api/projects fails
test_cases.then: error message visible; project list not rendered
test_cases.expected_result: Error state shown, no project rows rendered

test_cases.title: Add project — POST /api/projects returns 400 for missing name field
test_cases.then: response 400 with error 'missing_field'; projects.json unchanged
test_cases.expected_result: 400 missing_field; no write to disk

test_cases.title: Edit/remove project — DELETE /api/projects/:id returns 404 for unknown id
preconditions: projects.json has no project with id 'unknown-id'
test_cases.then: response 404 with error 'not_found'; projects.json unchanged
steps: Write projects.json with no entry matching 'unknown-id'
test_cases.expected_result: 404 not_found returned, no disk write

test_cases.title: Admin API — renameSync failure rolls back and returns 500
preconditions: Admin API handler loaded; renameSync mocked to throw ENOSPC
test_cases.given: POST /api/projects with valid body; fs.renameSync throws ENOSPC
test_cases.then: response 500 returned; original projects.json content preserved
test_cases.expected_result: 500 on disk failure; original file preserved

test_cases.title: setup deprecation — does not call aitri-hub write or spawn any child process
test_cases.then: child_process.spawn is never called; no file writes occur
test_cases.expected_result: No side effects beyond console output and exit

test_cases.title: monitor deprecation — exit code 0 regardless of missing projects.json
preconditions: projects.json does not exist; cmdMonitor called
test_cases.then: process.exit still called with 0; no crash or unhandled rejection
test_cases.expected_result: Exits cleanly with 0 even when data files missing

test_cases.title: monitor deprecation — stdout message references web URL not CLI watch mode
test_cases.then: output does NOT contain '--watch' or 'terminal' or 'dashboard'; DOES contain 'localhost'
steps: Assert output does NOT match /--watch|terminal dashboard/
test_cases.expected_result: Message directs to web UI, not terminal watch mode

test_cases.title: monitor deprecation — does not write dashboard.json or spawn watcher
test_cases.then: fs.writeFileSync never called; no setInterval registered
test_cases.expected_result: No file writes or polling initiated by deprecated command

test_cases.title: Dark mode — [data-theme='light'] selector absent from compiled CSS bundle
preconditions: CSS bundle built via vite build
test_cases.then: string '[data-theme="light"]' does not appear in any CSS file
test_cases.expected_result: No light-theme selector in production bundle

test_cases.title: Security — valid absolute path outside projects root rejected with 400
preconditions: Admin API handler; PROJECTS_ROOT set to /home/user/projects
test_cases.then: response 400 with error 'path_traversal'; no fs operations performed
test_cases.expected_result: 400 for absolute path outside allowed root

test_cases.title: Observability — failed API request logs 4xx status code
preconditions: Admin API handler; request with missing body
test_cases.then: stdout log line contains '400' status code
test_cases.expected_result: 4xx status code appears in log line

test_cases.title: E2E — add project via admin panel persists to projects.json and appears in home
preconditions: hub web server running on localhost:3000; projects.json empty
test_cases.when: user fills add-project form with name='Test Project' and location='/tmp/test-project' and submits
test_cases.then: projects.json contains the new entry; navigating to / shows a card with name 'Test Project'
steps: Read projects.json and assert entry with name 'Test Project' exists
test_cases.expected_result: New project persisted and visible on home page

test_cases.title: E2E — remove project via admin panel removes it from home view
preconditions: hub web server running; projects.json has one entry with id 'abc12345'
test_cases.given: user is on /admin with project 'Alpha' listed
test_cases.when: user clicks Remove for 'Alpha', confirms in modal, and modal closes
test_cases.then: projects.json no longer contains entry with id 'abc12345'; / shows no card for 'Alpha'
steps: Read projects.json and assert no entry with id 'abc12345'
test_cases.expected_result: Project removed from disk and no longer shown on home

test_cases.title: Usability — admin panel renders without horizontal scroll at 375px
test_cases.given: AdminPanel rendered at 375px viewport with 3 projects
test_cases.then: document.body.scrollWidth <= 375; all 3 project rows accessible
test_cases.expected_result: No horizontal overflow at 375px mobile viewport
